reports.title: design.md
reports.summary: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
reports.content: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

reports.title: OpenMontage
reports.summary: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
reports.content: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

reports.title: ai-berkshire
reports.summary: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
reports.content: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
reports.title_zh: AI 时代的伯克希尔研究框架

reports.title: TREK
reports.summary: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
reports.content: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

reports.title: container
reports.summary: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
reports.content: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
